description: Configure a new external DICOM Query/Retrieve (Q/R) node in Weasis to access an external PACS server. The node must have the description 'Regional_Partner_PACS', AE Title 'REGIONAL_ARCHIVE', Hostname '10.99.50.200', and Port '11112'. Save a screenshot of the node configuration interface to ~/Desktop/pacs_node_config.png and ensure the configuration is applied.
